ddls:
CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "subcategory_description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "body_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each body measurement */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the body measurement */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the body measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the size chart belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the clothing item */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the clothing item */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement of the clothing item */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement of the clothing item */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement of the clothing item */,
  "sleeve" REAL /* Sleeve measurement of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_charts_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory the item belongs to */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size chart the item belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item */,
  "body_measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the body measurement used for the recommendation */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_recommendations_body_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("body_measurement_id") REFERENCES body_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of the user (e.g., admin, customer service, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
